ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the contact */,
  "certified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contact is certified (true/false) */,
  "first_class_mail" INTEGER /* Indicates if first-class mail is permitted (true/false) */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the contact */,
  "email_address" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "preferred_communication" TEXT /* Preferred method of communication (e.g., Email, Fax) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Legal title of the contact (e.g., Judge, Attorney) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization or law firm the contact is associated with */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the contact */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "last_contacted" TEXT /* Date of the last communication with the contact */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communication_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the communication method (e.g., Email, Fax) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the communication method */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the method is the default preferred method for the contact */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the communication method is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correspondence_history" (
  "correspondence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correspondence record */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contact associated with the correspondence */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the correspondence was sent */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the communication method used */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the correspondence */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the correspondence */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the correspondence (e.g., sent, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correspondence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correspondence_history_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correspondence_history_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES communication_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correspondence_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contact that was modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made to the contact */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., update, delete, create) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fax_records" (
  "fax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fax record */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contact to whom the fax was sent */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the fax was sent */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number to which the fax was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the fax (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the fax */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file that was faxed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fax_records_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fax_records_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)
